response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to agentic workflows at Stripe, but lacks demonstrable production-scale experience in fintech infrastructure, multi-agent AI architecture for real-time financial decisioning, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10–15 people; his fintech domain knowledge and regulatory compliance experience are absent, and his leadership roles are ambiguous or non-executive.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure at Stripe via MCP frameworks
Proven backend and distributed systems experience with high-throughput systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record in credit risk, working capital, or compliance infrastructure critical to the role
